prompt:
Perform a comprehensive analysis on the "Online Retail II" dataset.
Input: online_retail.csv

1. Data Visualization:
   - Bar chart of transactions by country -> distribution_by_country.png
   - Time series of sales trends -> sales_trends_over_time.png
   - Correlation heatmap -> correlation_heatmap.png

2. Data Mining:
   - Market basket analysis with Apriori algorithm -> frequent_itemsets.csv
   - Most popular products and customer purchasing patterns -> popular_products_analysis.csv

3. Comprehensive Report:
   - Report with all visualizations, patterns, and business implications -> comprehensive_report.pdf
expected: 1. Visualization: Visualization Completeness — distribution_by_country.png, sales_trends_over_time.png, correlation_heatmap.png. 2. Data mining: Association Rule Coverage — Apriori frequent_itemsets.csv. 3. Report: Report Completeness — comprehensive_report.pdf.
